assessment_layer: AI pre-visit assessment with saved photos and floorplan; no in-person score yet
status: Newly assessed; value/land-heavy Mill Park option, weaker lifestyle fit than Buick

listing.build_age_read: Older renovated single-level home; photos show presentable cosmetic condition, but inspection/building-pest are important

visual_assessment.floorplan_confidence: high for dimensions; low for orientation because no north arrow is shown
visual_assessment.newness_read: Renovated and clean rather than new. Timber floors/windows and single-level plan suggest an older shell.
visual_assessment.study_work_area: No dedicated study; one secondary bedroom would need to become the office.
visual_assessment.kitchen_storage: Pantry plus appliance tower and usable cabinetry; no walk-in pantry.
visual_assessment.laundry_quality: Dedicated laundry with nearby corridor cupboards; positive for older stock.
visual_assessment.outdoor: Covered side verandah is useful, but the large 801m2 lawn/garden is maintenance-heavy.
visual_assessment.orientation_read: Photos look bright, but seasonal room-by-room light cannot be confidently assessed without a compass check.

soi_comparables: 1 Sussex Court, Mill Park - $740,000 on 15 Nov 2025

market_context.previous_sale_read: Public profile pages show a 2023 sale around $845,000, so current guide should be treated as price-sensitive and verified.

contract_watchpoints: No contract or Section 32 reviewed yet.
Check title, easements, drainage/sewer assets and any covenants.
Check permit history for verandah, sheds, kitchen, bathroom and other renovations.
Older renovated shell means building/pest inspection should be mandatory.

pre_visit_confidence: high for visuals and dimensions; medium overall because legal pack and in-person light/condition are unknown
next_action: Inspect only if the price stays meaningfully below Buick; verify large-yard maintenance burden, study compromise, ensuite size and older-shell condition.
